data.title: Revised CPI may give RBI reason to keep interest rates on hold
data.description: Although inflation remains well below RBI’s 4% target, the new figures could prompt it to hold off on any further rate cuts and push up bond yields further

data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: India’s renewable energy stocks gain after US trade deal
data.description: India’s renewable energy stocks gain after US reduces tariffs. Solar firms like Insolation, Oriana Power, and Adani Green see a rebound in exports and investor interest.
data.content:
Indias renewable energy stocks are starting to shake off their status as stragglers after President Donald Trumps surprise trade deal with the nation.
